Package org.eventb.internal.ui.propertiesView

Class TextSection

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.ui.views.properties.tabbed.AbstractPropertySection
org.eventb.internal.ui.propertiesView.TextSection
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.ui.views.properties.tabbed.ISection, IElementChangedListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
AssignmentSection, CommentSection, ExpressionSection, IdentifierSection, LabelSection, PredicateSection
public abstract class TextSection extends org.eclipse.ui.views.properties.tabbed.AbstractPropertySection implements IElementChangedListener
